scripts.test: pnpm --dir apps/web run test && pnpm run test:api
scripts.test:api: python3 -c "import os, sys; sys.exit(0 if os.environ.get('HALLIGALLI_TEST_REDIS_URL') else 'HALLIGALLI_TEST_REDIS_URL is required')" && uv run --project apps/api python -m unittest discover -s apps/api/tests -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose exec -T web node tests/e2e/compose-journeys.mjs
scripts.images:build: docker build --file apps/web/Dockerfile --tag halligalli-web:local --build-arg HALLIGALLI_RELEASE_VERSION=local --build-arg HALLIGALLI_RELEASE_COMMIT=development . && docker build --file apps/api/Dockerfile --tag halligalli-api:local --build-arg HALLIGALLI_RELEASE_VERSION=local --build-arg HALLIGALLI_RELEASE_COMMIT=development .
scripts.check: pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.contracts:openapi: uv run --project apps/api python -m halligalli_api.export_openapi contracts/openapi.json
scripts.contracts:check: pnpm run contracts:openapi && pnpm run contracts:types && git diff --exit-code -- contracts/openapi.json apps/web/src/multiplayer/rest.generated.ts
